agent_types.label: Coding Agent
agent_types.description: Reads, edits, or tests repository code and prepares patch-style changes.

agent_types.label: File Reading Agent
agent_types.description: Reads provided files and answers with grounded evidence or citations.

agent_types.label: Browser Navigation Agent
agent_types.description: Navigates websites, inspects browser state, and may fill or submit forms.

agent_types.label: Contract Review Agent
agent_types.description: Reviews contracts, rules, obligations, clauses, and fact/evidence gaps.

agent_types.label: Research Agent
agent_types.description: Finds, evaluates, and synthesizes sources with uncertainty handling.

agent_types.label: Workflow Automation Agent
agent_types.description: Coordinates multi-step tool workflows, routing, handoff, and state.

agent_types.label: Financial Transaction Agent (Simulated)
agent_types.description: Handles simulated-only payment, ordering, trading, or transfer workflows.

agent_types.label: General Tool-Use Agent
agent_types.description: Uses tools but does not fit a more specific broad family from supplied evidence.

agent_types.label: Unknown Agent
agent_types.description: Fallback when supplied evidence is too sparse for a concrete family.
